testcase.name: test_update_project_team
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_team_role_assignment.py:27: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_team_role_assignment.py:27: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
